articles.excerpt: This list of the top 40 four-mana commanders is full of many of the best commanders out there. How many of these have you played against?

articles.value: Fun Alternatives for the Top Ten Saltiest Commanders
articles.excerpt: Is your playgroup tired of your Tergrid deck? (Can't blame them.) Then check out this list of replacements for the saltiest commanders.

articles.value: Blinking Artifacts in Commander With Don & Leo, Problem Solvers
articles.excerpt: We're starting to get a look at the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles cards, and Kara's got a great blink deck with Don & Leo Problem Solvers.
Mono-blue artifact decks aren't lacking for good commanders (hi Urza), but does Donatello, Mutant Mechanic add anything interesting?
We've already seen a ton of new cards coming from 2026 Magic sets, so let's sign off on 2025 by looking at the best cards from the future.

container.description: Popular decks and cards for Urza, Lord High Artificer
container.title: Urza, Lord High Artificer (Commander)
